===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
Tulip first appeared in silhouette alongside the other [[Gym Leader]]s of [[Paldea]] in ''[[HZ046|Welcome to Naranja Academy!]]'' during [[Clavell]]'s explanation of how [[Tera Training]] works.

Tulip appeared in ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', where she partnered with [[Sidian]] as part of the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]]. Using her {{p|Espathra}}, she battled [[Rika]] and her {{p|Clodsire}} and {{p|Dugtrio}}, only to lose by default when Sidian's {{p|Garganacl}} was defeated.
